Updated backend tagged-suite scripts to fail on zero executed tests.

Fixed ContentService context null PublishedAt handling exposed by tests.

No separate staging branch workflow was added.
Main is promoted through the existing promotion PR flow rather than pushed directly.

recommendation: Push this slice to dev and observe CI Dev, Publish GHCR Dev, promotion, and CI Main Runtime.
